import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut seen: List<String> = []
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    mut found = false
    mut j = 0
    while j < seen.len()
      match seen.get(j)
      when Some(s)
        if s == t
          found = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if not found
      seen = list.push(seen, 0)
      seen = __list_set_string(seen, seen.len() - 1, t)
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("unique=#{count}")
